short_title: Re-parole approved → EAD denied
description: You filed I-131 with the EAD checkbox. Re-parole was approved but the work permit was denied separately. You have 30 days to respond.
bad_advice_circulating: Just wait, EAD will come later
product_solution: EAD denial diagnosis tool + MTR/NOID response checklist + 30-day deadline calculator

short_title: USCIS payment processed but portal shows unpaid
description: Money left your bank account but USCIS portal shows your case as unpaid or missing. This is a known systemic issue affecting thousands of filings.
bad_advice_circulating: Pay again to be safe
product_solution: Payment status checker guide + USCIS dispute template + bank statement attachment guide
validated_sources: FB Tetiana 1447 comments | FB Skylex Lawyer 668 comments | Telegram cross-account confirmed

short_title: Re-parole 2026: form-only no longer sufficient
description: Since August 2025, USCIS requires PERSONAL evidence (medical, family, employment) for re-parole — not just general 'war in Ukraine' justification.
bad_advice_circulating: Just describe the war situation
product_solution: Re-parole evidence builder + 500-character justification generator with situation-based templates
validated_sources: FB Олександра Гоелз 514 comments | Telegram Адаптація UA confirmed Aug 2025 policy shift

short_title: TPS EAD auto-extension expires July 22 2026
description: TPS Ukraine designation extends to October 19 2026 but your EAD auto-extension only goes until July 22 2026. File a new EAD application before then or risk losing work authorization.
bad_advice_circulating: TPS extended to October so EAD valid until October
product_solution: Deadline alert banner + employer letter template + I-9 reverification guidance
validated_sources: FB Малюк 1820 comments | FB Selfreliance 322 comments | Federal Register 90 FR 5936

short_title: Parole expiring soon only receipt notice in hand
description: Your parole is expiring in days. You filed re-parole and got a receipt notice. Whether the receipt protects your legal status depends on your I-94 expiry vs filing date.
bad_advice_circulating: You're fine if you filed
product_solution: Emergency receipt status explainer + state of presence checker + lawyer referral

short_title: Can I work on I-94 / re-parole alone?
description: Re-parole grants presence authorization only. Work requires separate EAD approval. ChatGPT has been giving incorrect category-based advice on this.
bad_advice_circulating: ChatGPT says you can work for 90 days | I-94 includes work authorization
product_solution: 'Can I work right now?' eligibility checker by parole category
validated_sources: FB UA Community 312 comments — ChatGPT explicitly named

short_title: U4U sponsor threatening deportation / abuse
description: Some U4U sponsors threaten parolees with deportation if they don't comply with demands. Victims have legal protection — U-visa available for abuse victims.
bad_advice_circulating: Do not report or you'll be deported
product_solution: Sponsor abuse legal guide + U-visa explainer + reporting flowchart + safe contact list
validated_sources: FB UA Community admin post (comments DISABLED) | Shepelsky Law page

short_title: TPS Ukraine expires October 19 2026 no renewal expected
description: Under current administration no country with expired TPS has been renewed. Plan transition pathways now (asylum has 1-year filing window from arrival).
bad_advice_circulating: It will definitely be renewed
product_solution: Status transition planning tool + TPS-to-asylum timeline + alternative pathway guide
validated_sources: Telegram Помощь U4U/HP 3100+ views | Юридические послуги США 81K subs

short_title: Missing RFE response deadline
description: USCIS sets a hard deadline on RFEs (typically 30-87 days). Missing it = case denied. Many users misread the deadline date.
bad_advice_circulating: You have plenty of time to respond
product_solution: RFE deadline calculator + response template library

short_title: Missing biometrics appointment without rescheduling
description: Failure to appear at biometrics without rescheduling can result in case denial under abandonment grounds.
bad_advice_circulating: Just don't go they'll reschedule automatically
product_solution: Biometrics rescheduling guide + abandonment recovery options

short_title: Wrong EAD category code on I-765
description: Filing I-765 with wrong category (c11 for re-parole vs a12 for TPS vs c19 for TPS pending) leads to denial.
bad_advice_circulating: Pick whatever category fits closest
product_solution: Category code selector + form decision tree

short_title: I-9 employer reverification on EAD expiry
description: Employers must reverify work authorization when EAD expires. Auto-extension rules are confusing both for workers and HR.
bad_advice_circulating: Your employer must keep you regardless
product_solution: I-9 employer letter generator + Federal Register citation kit
validated_sources: FB Selfreliance + Telegram TPS та Дозвіл

short_title: Wrong checkbox on I-131 (Box 10.C vs others)
description: Ukrainian re-parole filers should select Box 10.C. Many mistakenly check 'outside US' boxes meant for Advance Parole travel.
bad_advice_circulating: Just check the box that mentions parole
product_solution: Form I-131 checkbox decision guide

short_title: G-1145 submitted separately
description: G-1145 e-notification only works if attached IN the same package as the petition. Filing separately = no notification.
bad_advice_circulating: File it before you send the package
product_solution: G-1145 attachment checklist + filing kit instructions

short_title: AR-11 address change deadline (10 days)
description: You have 10 days from moving to file AR-11. Many users miss this deadline because they don't know it exists.
bad_advice_circulating: Update later when you have time
product_solution: AR-11 deadline calculator + filing reminder

short_title: Fee waiver denied for insufficient evidence
description: USCIS requires specific documentation for I-912: means-tested benefit OR household income OR financial hardship. Generic statements rejected.
bad_advice_circulating: Just say you can't afford it
product_solution: Fee waiver evidence checklist by qualifying ground

short_title: Filing without retrieving I-94 first
description: Many fields on USCIS forms (class of admission, last arrival date) come from your I-94. Filing without retrieving it = errors.
bad_advice_circulating: The information is in your passport stamps
product_solution: I-94 retrieval guide + form prefill helper

short_title: Confused by USCIS receipt number format
description: Receipt numbers begin with EAC/WAC/LIN/SRC/NBC/MSC/IOE + 10 digits. Users enter spaces or dashes and check fails.
bad_advice_circulating: Type it however you have it
product_solution: Receipt format normalizer + visual format guide

short_title: Missing asylum 1-year filing deadline
description: You must file I-589 within 1 year of last arrival in US (with limited exceptions). Many TPS holders miss this filing window.
bad_advice_circulating: You can file asylum any time
product_solution: Asylum eligibility timeline + 1-year deadline alert

short_title: Traveling on TPS without Advance Parole
description: TPS does not include travel authorization. Leaving US without Advance Parole document = TPS abandonment.
bad_advice_circulating: TPS lets you travel like any visa
product_solution: Travel decision tree for TPS holders

short_title: EAD card has wrong name spelling
description: Name on EAD doesn't match passport / SSN. Causes I-9 issues with employer.
bad_advice_circulating: Just use the EAD as is
product_solution: Name correction request guide

short_title: Bringing wrong ID to biometrics appointment
description: USCIS requires specific ID at biometrics: appointment notice + government-issued photo ID. Bringing wrong docs = rescheduling.
bad_advice_circulating: Bring whatever passport you have
product_solution: Biometrics document checklist by appointment type

short_title: USCIS Contact Center gives wrong information
description: USCIS Contact Center reps frequently give incorrect info. Always verify against written USCIS sources.
bad_advice_circulating: USCIS officer told me X so it must be true
product_solution: Contact Center quote verification guide

short_title: Denial letter without clear reason
description: Some denial letters cite generic grounds (203(a)(7) abandonment etc.). Decoding requires reading USCIS Policy Manual.
bad_advice_circulating: Reapply from scratch
product_solution: Denial letter decoder + grounds-by-grounds response guide

short_title: Updating personal info after filing
description: Address change AR-11 is separate from updating address on each pending case. Two different processes.
bad_advice_circulating: AR-11 updates everything
product_solution: Post-filing update checklist

short_title: Path to green card from TPS
description: TPS does not lead directly to green card. Requires separate qualifying path (employment / family / asylum).
bad_advice_circulating: TPS holders get green card automatically after X years
product_solution: Status transition planning tool

short_title: Sponsor refusing to honor I-864 obligations
description: I-864 affidavit of support is enforceable contract. Sponsors abandoning obligations face legal consequences.
bad_advice_circulating: The sponsor can just walk away
product_solution: Sponsor obligation enforcement guide

short_title: Filing asylum without legal representation
description: Asylum has significantly higher denial rates pro se. Strongly recommend attorney or DOJ-accredited rep.
bad_advice_circulating: You don't need a lawyer
product_solution: Asylum legal rep finder (DOJ EOIR roster)

short_title: Filing EAD renewal too late
description: Filing EAD renewal less than 180 days before expiry can cause employment gap if processing delays.
bad_advice_circulating: Renew when it expires
product_solution: EAD renewal calculator with 180-day buffer

short_title: Confusing Advance Parole vs Reentry Permit
description: I-131 is one form for multiple purposes. Wrong selection = wrong document = travel issues.
bad_advice_circulating: They're the same document
product_solution: I-131 purpose selector

short_title: STEM OPT extension confused with EAD auto-extension
description: STEM OPT extension is specific to F-1 students. Different rules from TPS/parole EAD auto-extension.
bad_advice_circulating: All EAD extensions work the same
product_solution: EAD type-specific extension guide

short_title: Filing without G-28 attorney notice
description: If using attorney G-28 must be on file. Filing without it means USCIS communicates only with applicant.
bad_advice_circulating: Attorney is just a helper they don't need a form
product_solution: G-28 filing reminder

short_title: Old paper receipt vs USCIS online account
description: Some users have paper receipts but no online account. Confusion about status checking methods.
bad_advice_circulating: Online account tracks everything automatically
product_solution: Account vs paper receipt explainer

short_title: Self-certified translation rejected by USCIS
description: USCIS requires translator certification of competence. Self-translation by applicant accepted in some cases but risky.
bad_advice_circulating: I can translate my own documents
product_solution: Translation certification template + competence statement

short_title: Direct denial without RFE first
description: USCIS can deny without issuing RFE if case clearly unapprovable. Many users expect RFE phase that never comes.
bad_advice_circulating: RFE always comes first
product_solution: Denial recovery options (MTR Appeal Refile)
